evidence: Implemented Phase 5 framework topology detection: expanded EdgeKind with framework topology kinds; added framework pass that detects Next.js API routes, static React/client fetch('/api/...') calls, route-to-service edges from resolved call graph, and webhook routes; chunking appends framework edges after import/LSP resolution; traceFlow and ContextPack topology include calls_api/routes_to/handles_webhook. Regression tests cover React fetch to API route, API route to service, webhook recognition, trace_flow framework edges, and ContextPack topology evidence. Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build.

Evaluator passed: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build. Completion audit: EdgeKind includes framework topology kinds; framework detector creates calls_api for React static fetch to Next route, routes_to from route handlers to services using resolved call graph, handles_webhook for webhook route paths; traceFlow and ContextPack topology expose these framework edges. Tests cover all declared criteria.
